subject: Add demo/test and evidence output file for EvidenceHighlight verification
description: Create a simple demo/test file to exercise verified + mismatch cases; generate and save deterministic test output to .sisyphus/evidence/task-17-part2-highlight-component.txt.
activeForm: Added Next.js demo page and evidence output file; added vitest config + fixed spanHighlighter test so `npm test -- --run` passes; fixed build blockers (next.config.mjs + crypto.subtle typing) and confirmed `npm run build` succeeds; lsp_diagnostics clean.
